meaning: n.用水池,水车用贮水池,<谑>大西洋(尤指英美间的航道)
examples: The sea was as calm as a millpond.
Drove she ducklings to the millpond, every morning just at nine.
All around, a millpond sea and the sky tinged pink at the horizon.
But it precludes escape on a day when the water is as flat as a millpond.
He claims that "like other palaces", Lambeth attracts "courtiers" whose main priority is to maintain a "still millpond" with "a minimum of activity".
